subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the One Who is Remembered, through Whom were spread abroad the Books of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting - verily, the tale of Sinai hath returned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور الذی به نشرت کتب الله المهیمن القیوم قد رجع حدیث الطور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
